# sambajarju.com
> Samba Jarju — Data Marketeer & Marketing Automation specialist based in Rotterdam, Netherlands.

## Pages
- [Home](https://sambajarju.com/): Portfolio homepage with about, projects, experience, tools, testimonials, FAQ and contact.
- [ABM Outreach](https://sambajarju.com/abm-outreach): Case study of a fully automated Account-Based Marketing pipeline with AI personalization, branded CVs, and personalized landing pages.
- [Playground](https://sambajarju.com/playground): Interactive marketing demos — A/B Test Arena, Subject Line Analyzer, SQL Query Builder.
- [Dynamic Branding](https://sambajarju.com/for): Live demo showing personalized landing pages that adapt to any company's brand colors and logo.
- [Blog](https://sambajarju.com/blog): Articles on marketing automation, email marketing, and data-driven strategies.

## Projects
- [PayWatch.app](https://www.paywatch.app): AI-powered invoice tracker for Dutch households. Built with Next.js, Supabase, Gemini AI.
- [Cleanprofs.nl](https://cleanprofs.nl): Freelance marketing automation via Deployteq for a professional cleaning company.
- [Workwings.nl](https://workwings.nl): Staffing agency website.

## Professional
- Role: Email Marketeer at Vandebron (Dutch energy company)
- Specialties: CRM, email marketing, marketing automation, SQL, AMPScript, Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Snowflake
- Tools: HubSpot, Deployteq, Mailchimp, Klaviyo, Zapier, Make, n8n, Sanity CMS, Supabase
- Education: Rotterdam Business School, Entrepreneurship BA 2021-2025
